title: Slick (BFF-1 bulk freighter)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Slick}}
'''''Slick''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] which carried [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and attempted to board the [[Habassa]] freighter group [[Jess (freighter group)|''Jess'']] in the [[Pii system/Legends|Pii system]]. It was destroyed by [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
